name: Marinated Grilled Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into 1/8 by 1 inch slices.
2. Combine the sliced pork with the remaining ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 4-24 hours to allow the flavors to develop.
4. Remove the pork from the marinade, allowing it to drain any excess liquid.
5. Grill or broil the pork for 4-8 minutes on each side until nicely browned.
6. Serve hot or at room temperature.
